vocab.meaning: xung đột, không ăn nhập với (về màu sắc)
vocab.example: I believe choosing the right shade is vital because a neon car would definitely clash with the historical architecture of my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: vấn đề thuộc về sở thích cá nhân
vocab.example: Ultimately, car color is a matter of personal taste, though some people prioritize utility over aesthetics.

vocab.meaning: thu hút sự chú ý/bắt mắt
vocab.example: While a bright red Ferrari is designed to catch the eye, I prefer more subdued tones that blend into the crowd.

vocab.meaning: điều bổ sung khiến mọi thứ trở nên hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: A car's performance is what matters most, but a sleek, sophisticated color is definitely the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, khác biệt với số đông
vocab.example: Custom paint jobs allow enthusiasts to stand out from the crowd and express their unique individuality on the road.
